title: Watch: IDF shares footage of Hezbollah living quarters in underground tunnels
summary_full: Israeli forces have released footage of Hezbollah living quarters in southern Lebanon, highlighting ongoing tensions despite a ceasefire. The IDF reported striking over 100 targets, including weapons caches and tunnel routes, amidst an escalating drone war.
